name: 오서진
headerTaglineFour: 공정모사, 공정제어, CCUS 분야를 탐구하고 있습니다.

projects.title: Sustainable Aviation Fuel Process Simulation
projects.description: Designed an Alcohol-to-Jet based SAF production process using DWSIM and adjusted key variables such as H2 flow rate, reactor conditions, and residence time to reproduce target production and conversion results.

projects.title: Biological Reactor Digital Twin
projects.description: Designed and fabricated a small-scale reactor, collected temperature and gas data using Arduino-based sensors, and explored model-based monitoring and control for microbial decomposition processes.

projects.title: PIML-based TIM Thermal Conductivity Prediction
projects.description: Built simulation models using SimScale and Onshape to analyze bidirectional TIM heat transfer behavior and visualize temperature response for engineering design improvement.

projects.title: CO2 Hydrogenation Catalyst Research
projects.description: Analyzed CO2 hydrogenation catalysts for DME and methanol production by connecting TEM, XRD, TPR, and TPD characterization results with catalytic performance and reaction selectivity.

projects.title: Pilot Plant Process Control Interest
projects.description: Interested in AI-based pilot plant automation, real-time process monitoring, PLC/DCS control logic, and multivariable optimization for CO2 capture and conversion processes.

services.title: Process Simulation
services.description: Experience in building process flowsheets with DWSIM and analyzing how feed conditions, reactor variables, separation units, and energy flows affect overall process performance.

services.title: Process Control & Monitoring
services.description: Experience in reactor operation, Arduino-based sensor data collection, and interpreting temperature and gas data to understand system behavior.

services.title: Thermal & Flow Analysis
services.description: Hands-on experience with COMSOL, SimScale, and Onshape for analyzing internal gas flow, temperature distribution, and heat transfer behavior.

services.title: Catalyst & Reaction Analysis
services.description: Experience in connecting catalyst characterization results from TEM, XRD, TPR, and TPD with reaction performance, selectivity, and process conditions.

aboutpara: I am a chemical engineering student at SKKU with a strong interest in process engineering, process control, and CCUS-related technologies. Through projects involving sustainable aviation fuel process simulation, biological reactor digital twin modeling, TIM thermal analysis, and CO2 hydrogenation catalyst research, I have developed an engineering approach that connects reaction principles, process variables, data interpretation, and practical system implementation. I am especially interested in expanding lab-scale reaction and simulation experience toward pilot plant operation, automation, and process optimization.

resume.tagline: Chemical engineering student focused on process engineering, process control, and CCUS.
resume.description: Experienced in process simulation, reactor fabrication, sensor-based monitoring, thermal-flow analysis, and catalyst performance interpretation.

bullets: Built an Alcohol-to-Jet based SAF production process using DWSIM
Modeled feed input, reaction, separation, and energy flow as one process system
Adjusted H2 flow rate, reactor conditions, and residence time to reproduce target conversion and production results
Designed and fabricated a small-scale acrylic reactor
Built stirring structures and internal supports using 3D printing
Collected temperature and gas data using Arduino-based sensors
Used COMSOL to analyze internal gas flow and temperature distribution
Conducted thermal response simulation using SimScale and Onshape
Defined boundary conditions and input variables for heat transfer analysis
Visualized model geometry and simulation concepts using Blender
Won the grand prize in an academic seminar with 118 participants
Studied CO2 hydrogenation catalysts for DME and methanol production
Analyzed TEM, XRD, TPR, and TPD characterization results
Connected catalyst structure and surface properties with reaction selectivity

education.universityPara: Completed coursework and projects related to thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, process control, reaction engineering, process design, process simulation, and data-based engineering analysis.
